title: Canned Goods :|
description: Lets you store double the food in one slot, at the cost of a little iron. Brace yourself for adventures that last TWICE AS LONG!
body:
Experience the "Canned Goods" mod—a Minecraft game-changer that lets you store double the food in one slot, at the cost of a little iron. Brace yourself for adventures that last TWICE AS LONG!
 

Features

Provides a huge 35! canned foods
Also adds 3 soda cans and 1 canned good with special abilities!
And a way to recycle the cans
 

Note

As right now this mod is extremely new and if anyone has ideas I'd love to try them out and maybe add them.


- 35! canned foods

- 3 soda cans and 1 canned good

-way to recycle the cans
 

NEW FEATURES

Added Mini Fizz (throwable can)
Added Mysterious Beanie (vanity Item)
Added Canned Golem (Interesting Mob)
Added Crushed Empty Can (Crafting Use)
 

Installation

Install Forge
Navigate to your .minecraft folder
Download appropriate version of the mod for Forge or Fabric and place the jar file in .minecraft/mods
PLAY!!!
 

Modpacks

Yes, you can use this mod in your modpack.

 

BTW "Create Mod" compatibility coming soon so modpack creators get ready.
